- Description: Warmup queue perf: 37s→5s (fix the 504 on warmup_review + notification badge)

  Details:
  After fixing the GAS compile bug (#312), getWarmupReviewQueue was still ~37s warm (N+1 Gmail getPlainBody per draft) → exceeded Edgar's nginx proxy timeout → 502/504 on warmup_review.html + the notifications 'warmup' badge. Made full Gmail bodies opt-in (?withBodies=true); default now returns fast on the sheet's 500-char body_preview (warmup_review.html falls back gracefully). Deployed @49. Verified live: direct GAS 37s→4.8s; via Edgar proxy 502→HTTP 200 in 5.4s. tokenomics#313 (auto-merge once CI green; fix already deployed + verified).
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/313
